mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT * FROM CAREER_DIAGNOSIS WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY DIAGNOSIS_ID DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
mapper.insert:
SELECT CAREER_DIAGNOSIS_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO CAREER_DIAGNOSIS ( DIAGNOSIS_ID, USER_ID, LLM_SUMMARY, LEVEL_TEST_BUILD_STATUS, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{diagnosisId}, #{userId}, #{llmSummary, jdbcType=CLOB}, #{levelTestBuildStatus, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LEVEL_TEST_ANSWER_LOG al JOIN LEVEL_TEST_QUESTION q ON al.LEVEL_QUESTION_ID = q.LEVEL_QUESTION_ID WHERE q.DIAGNOSIS_ID = #{diagnosisId}
SELECT SKILL_ID AS skillId, SKILL_NAME AS skillName, PARENT_SKILL_ID AS parentSkillId, SKILL_TYPE AS skillType FROM SKILL WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY SKILL_TYPE, SKILL_NAME
mapper.insert:
SELECT LEVEL_TEST_QUESTION_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO LEVEL_TEST_QUESTION ( LEVEL_QUESTION_ID, DIAGNOSIS_ID, SKILL_ID, QUESTION_TEXT, QUESTION_TYPE, DIFFICULTY, EXPLANATION ) VALUES ( #{levelQuestionId}, #{diagnosisId}, #{skillId}, #{questionText, jdbcType=CLOB}, #{questionType}, #{difficulty}, #{explanation, jdbcType=CLOB} )

SELECT LEVEL_TEST_OPTION_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO LEVEL_TEST_OPTION ( LEVEL_OPTION_ID, LEVEL_QUESTION_ID, OPTION_NO, OPTION_TEXT, CORRECT_YN ) VALUES ( #{levelOptionId}, #{levelQuestionId}, #{optionNo}, #{optionText, jdbcType=CLOB}, #{correctYn} )
mapper.select: SELECT q.*, o.LEVEL_OPTION_ID, o.OPTION_NO, o.OPTION_TEXT FROM LEVEL_TEST_QUESTION q LEFT JOIN LEVEL_TEST_OPTION o ON q.LEVEL_QUESTION_ID = o.LEVEL_QUESTION_ID WHERE q.DIAGNOSIS_ID = #{diagnosisId} ORDER BY q.LEVEL_QUESTION_ID, o.OPTION_NO

SELECT q.*, o.LEVEL_OPTION_ID, o.OPTION_NO, o.OPTION_TEXT, o.CORRECT_YN FROM LEVEL_TEST_QUESTION q LEFT JOIN LEVEL_TEST_OPTION o ON q.LEVEL_QUESTION_ID = o.LEVEL_QUESTION_ID WHERE q.DIAGNOSIS_ID = #{diagnosisId} ORDER BY q.LEVEL_QUESTION_ID, o.OPTION_NO
mapper.insert:
SELECT LEVEL_TEST_ANSWER_LOG_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO LEVEL_TEST_ANSWER_LOG ( LEVEL_ANSWER_ID, USER_ID, LEVEL_QUESTION_ID, SELECTED_OPTION_ID, CORRECT_YN ) VALUES ( #{levelAnswerId}, #{userId}, #{levelQuestionId}, #{selectedOptionId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{correctYn} )
mapper.select: SELECT SKILL_NAME FROM SKILL WHERE SKILL_ID = #{skillId}

SELECT DISTINCT p.SKILL_NAME FROM CAREER_TARGET_SKILL cts JOIN SKILL s ON cts.SKILL_ID = s.SKILL_ID JOIN SKILL p ON s.PARENT_SKILL_ID = p.SKILL_ID WHERE cts.DIAGNOSIS_ID = #{diagnosisId} AND ROWNUM = 1
